title: Anonymous Functions and Closures
description: Create functions without names and use them as values.

slides.title: What is an Anonymous Function?
Using Anonymous Functions
slides.codeSnippet:
<?php
$multiply = function($a, $b) {
    return $a * $b;
};
echo $multiply(3, 4);

$numbers = [1, 2, 3, 4];
$squared = array_map(function($n) {
    return $n * $n;
}, $numbers);
print_r($squared);
?>

slides.title: Closures and 'use'
Using 'use'
Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Passing by Reference

You can pass variables by reference with `use (&$var)` to allow the closure to modify the outer variable.

quizData.explanation: The `use` captures `$msg` by value, not reference. Changing it inside the closure doesn't affect the outer variable.
